creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to pete from comment #2)
> Hi, would it be possible to set a flag to silence these messages?

Ideally we'd emit these messages only once, on the first use of an unsupported type/option/argument. This serves to inform developers of missing functionality that needs to be implemented, and serves to inform users that their applications may not function correctly. Making such a change to the logging functionality ought to be done, independent of the fact that netlink support is being added. We'll want to track that somewhere other than this PR.
